title: Workspace usage rollups
description: Rolls raw per-call `usage` rows into per-workspace daily aggregates (calls, tokens) with an ESTIMATED cost from a static rate map. A 6-hour cron (usageRollups.rollupDay) upserts workspaceUsageDaily; workspaceUsage feeds a per-day WorkspaceUsageCard. Cost is an estimate, not a bill — missing-rate models flag hasRate=false and floor to 0.
